dismissalText.commentary: Mitchell Marsh c Bethell b Hazlewood 111 (56b 9x4 9x6 82m) SR: 198.21

dismissalComment.html: caught at deep point! Marsh didn't really get going after the resumption, he's carved this low full toss flat and hard, Bethell catches it just above his head, he walks off to a big round of applause from his team-mates
